Welcome!
Event Check-in

Event Check-in QR

Display this branded QR at the entrance. Attendees scan here; the system decides check-in, review, deny, or checkout from their state.

Staff Auth
Upload a staff HELLO QR image or paste the payload. Manual check-in unlocks after authentication.
Unauthenticated
No staff session active.
Doorman Console
Use this mode when staff are actively admitting attendees. Preferred long-term plan: reuse the normal IRLid scan window for HELLO codes, then branch into expected-attendee matching when needed.
Scan attendee QR
Live webcam is the primary path. Paste-or-upload remains as a backup if the camera is unavailable. Device-key QRs open the doorman escalation flow.
Camera idle — click Scan with camera to start.
Delete mode — click a row to remove
Expected attendees
Expected attendee management
Expected attendee management
When identity is unclear

If the attendee is not already linked, the intended flow is to send them to an assisted identity screen where they can select themselves from the expected list and provide any additional proof required by organisation policy.

Preferred path:
1. reuse normal IRLid scanner
2. detect HELLO vs venue QR
3. if unmatched, go to assisted identity flow
✓ Check-out enabled

Settings below apply to the active mode. Switch mode to edit a different outcome's celebration + sound.
Background (palette + cycle motion — always active under every overlay)
Background palette (up to 7 colours; one swatch = solid colour, two or more = cycle)
+
+
+
30s
enable Image overlay (branded image with position / symmetry / scale)
PNG / SVG / JPEG, ≤ 200 KB. Uploading auto-enables this overlay.
Horizontal: mirror across vertical centre (left+right bookends). Vertical: mirror across horizontal centre (top+bottom bookends). Quad: image appears at all 4 corners (only when position is a corner).
0 (natural)
enable Pattern overlay (tile a CSS pattern on top of the palette)
QR customization (foreground colour + celebration palette + effects)
QR foreground
The dark modules of the QR. Preview updates live.
Celebration palette (click a swatch to pick; used by the accept-cycle burst on successful check-in)
+
+
Celebration animation (sequence-based — fires top-to-bottom on successful check-in)
Drag effects from the library into the sequence. Each effect has its own duration. Insert ⏱ Delay rows to time gaps between effects. Max 10 items. Empty sequence = no celebration.

customise Banner styling (optional font styling for the banner above the QR)
Accept behaviour (for the currently active mode — switch mode at top to edit a different one)
Outcome sound (played when this mode fires; same file fired by Sample button at top)

Service-account login (legacy mode for non-interactive integrations)
Use only for non-interactive integrations. Bearer + QR sign-in is preferred for humans.
Sign-out
Either button revokes server-side; other devices bounce within 30s (v5.10.5 + v5.10.7).

Records & ID

backeddesign-in — v5.12
Records & ID is design-in only this release. Backend storage broker arrives in v5.13+ — see PROTOCOL.md.
IRLid doesn't store these records. When enrolment data or proof-of-ID is captured at check-in, IRLid forwards it directly to your configured storage destination — Google Drive, OneDrive, your own SFTP, etc. We retain a hash and reference only, for verification. Your org owns the data; IRLid brokers the capture.
not configuredRecords capture is OFF until a destination is connected.
Storage destination (connector + folder + Connect button) IN-DESIGN
OAuth opens in a new window; credential-based connectors prompt inline.
What to capture at check-in (photo ID, DOB, address, emergency contact, medical, waiver, custom fields) IN-DESIGN
Driving licence / passport / national ID. Image upload from device camera.
For age-gated events.
For correspondence and emergency contact.
Name + phone — common for kids' classes, gyms, outdoor activities.
Allergies, conditions, dietary requirements. Handled per your org's privacy policy.
PDF or signature image, generated at first check-in.
For org-specific data (membership number, year group, etc.)
Privacy & retention (retention policy, encryption, Right to be Forgotten) IN-DESIGN
Always on — TLS 1.3 to your storage destination.
Your storage destination's responsibility. IRLid doesn't hold copies to encrypt.
Removes IRLid's hash + reference. You delete the original from your storage.
Why this matters (architectural rationale — GDPR, retention, breach reporting)

Holding identity documents creates legal weight (GDPR, retention obligations, breach reporting). IRLid stays out of that pipeline by design — we never see the document body, only a hash that lets us prove a record was captured if you need to attest to it later. The org owns the data; IRLid owns the proof-of-capture.

Organisation settings

Compact desktop settings screen with the old app nav restored. Local-only test mode. No Cloudflare writes.

Basic test identity

Staff invites Create a single-use QR for a new staff or manager login.

Branding and post-accept behaviour

Theme

Interface mode
Primary colour
Buttons, active states, key CTAs.
Accent colour
Hover states, badges, secondary highlights.
QR foreground
Contrast: ✓ readable.
Background palette Up to 7 colours — used by the QR-canvas page-cycle animation and pattern overlay.
Celebration palette Up to 7 colours — used by the accept-cycle animation when a check-in succeeds.
Background Animation

Choose how the page reacts. Page-cycle restyles the whole canvas through your palette; QR-glow only haloes QRs; Pattern overlays a tiled motif; Image uses uploaded artwork.

Upload image
PNG, SVG, or JPEG up to 200 KB. Smaller is better, especially in Tile mode. Larger files inflate per-org storage.
Responsibility: upload only images you own or have rights to. IRLid does not pre-screen uploads; abuse is your responsibility under the test-env terms.
Image position
Symmetry
Horizontal: mirror across vertical centre (left+right bookends).
Vertical: mirror across horizontal centre (top+bottom bookends).
Quad: image appears at all 4 corners (only when position is a corner).
Anchor
Fast (5s) Slow (120s)
Celebration Animation

A burst that fires on successful check-in. Mirrors Background's mode options but runs as a one-shot using the Celebration palette and Cycle duration below.

Colour source
Intensity
Sweep
Motion
Ring thickness
Sweep
Centre pulse
Saturation
Pattern

QR test tools

Hosted scan QR tucked below, with a larger active outcome QR above for easier scanning.

ACTIVE MODE: ALLOW

Active outcome QR

Switch between Allow, Review, and Deny. Only the selected outcome QR is shown.

Hosted scan page

Less-used debug helper. Expand when you want the phone pointed at the hosted scanner.

⌄
This page only prepares and previews test URLs. It does not perform Cloudflare writes or any production attendance action.

Role vocabulary

Rename the roles your team sees in the dashboard and on-screen prompts. Permissions stay the same — this is presentation only.

Save All Settings (above) writes these changes to your org. Dashboard relabelling rolls out alongside this panel — initial pass shows where the labels read; full sweep follows.

Website theme import

Paste your organisation's public website and we'll suggest primary colour, accent, logo, and brand text from the site's metadata. Placeholder — implementation in progress.

Theme-from-website import: deferred to v5.13+. When it lands, it'll pull colour palette, logo, and welcome text from your public site and show every suggestion for review before any of it saves.
